p2p_enrich.notes: Added repo CI/CD tests as p2p gates: test_repo_ruff (ruff F401/F821 lint check), test_repo_black (black formatting check). Verified both pass on base commit. Also existing test_syntax_check and test_function_decomposes_permute pass. Discovered repo uses ruff, black, isort, codespell from .pre-commit-config.yaml. CI workflows use 'python3 run_suite.py' for testing but requires full sglang deps.
